headlines.headline: Wyrnik Sciences reports 18% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% decline in operating income directly signals reduced profitability and operational inefficiency, which typically triggers immediate negative market sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
